expectations.text: MaxItems:1 blocks migrated to SingleNestedAttribute OR ListNestedBlock with listvalidator.SizeAtMost(1)
Reasoning explicitly cites the skill's blocks.md decision rules (or directly equivalent skill-bundled material)
